metadata.title: Edit Any Image Without Regenerating - AI Layer Image Editor
metadata.description: Layer any product photo, poster, AI image, or social creative. Edit selected objects, text, backgrounds, clothing, and products without changing the whole composition.
metadata.keywords: edit AI image without regenerating, edit midjourney image, modify AI generated product photos, change background of AI product image, AI image revision tool, edit poster without Photoshop, consistent character editing, separate text from image AI, keep same composition AI editing

hero.title: Upload any poster. Edit every object like layers.
hero.description: Image Layered turns flat images into editable layers, so you can change text, replace products, remove objects, and redesign posters with AI.

announcement.title: ✨ Turn Any Poster into Editable AI Layers

hero.tip: Trusted by creators for poster edits, product swaps, and editable AI layers

logos.title: Layer decomposition plus GPT Image 2 poster editing

introduce.title: Turn Flat Images into Editable PSD-like Layers
introduce.label: Core Features
introduce.description: Image Layered uses a dedicated layer-decomposition model to split flat images into transparent RGBA layers, then sends selected elements to high-quality image editing models for prompt-based poster redesign.

items.title: Smart Auto Layering
items.description: Upload an image, AI automatically recognizes object contours and precisely separates layers. Products, backgrounds, text, decorations - each gets its own layer for easy editing.

items.title: AI Background Replacement
items.description: Describe the background you want in plain language, AI automatically replaces it. Product scenes, portrait environments - intelligent filling looks natural and realistic.

items.title: Smart Object Selection
items.description: AI automatically identifies subjects and precisely cuts them out. Hair strands, transparent materials - all handled accurately with natural, clean edges.

items.title: Independent Layer Editing
items.description: Each element becomes an independent layer that can be color-adjusted, replaced, or deleted separately. Works like Photoshop but much simpler.

benefits.title: Why Choose Us
benefits.label: Product Advantages
benefits.description: Save money, save time, save effort. One person equals an entire design team - handle e-commerce product images, design assets, and social media content effortlessly.

items.title: Completely Free, No Hidden Fees
items.description: Get 10 free credits upon registration, earn more daily through check-ins. Most features are free to use. Paid features cost 100x less than hiring a designer.

items.title: No Design Skills Needed, Master in 3 Steps
items.description: Unlike Photoshop that requires months of learning. Our tool is as simple as clicking a mouse. Upload → AI Decompose → Export, done in 3 steps.

items.title: Optimized for Global Users
items.description: Multi-language support, diverse payment methods, instant customer support. No VPN needed, no language barriers - just smooth operations.

usage.title: Professional Image Editing in 3 Steps
usage.description: No design background needed. Follow these steps and see how other users do it:

items.title: Step 1: Upload Image
items.description: Click the upload button or drag and drop your image directly. Supports PNG, JPG, WEBP and other common formats. Recommended image size under 10MB.

items.title: Step 2: AI Auto Layering
items.description: Click the "One-Click Layer" button, AI automatically analyzes the image and separates products, backgrounds, text, and other elements into independent layers. Takes just 3-5 seconds.

items.title: Step 3: Edit & Export
items.description: In the left layer panel, click the layer you want to edit. Hide, delete, change background, adjust colors - when done, click export and save your HD image.

items.title: Pro Tips
items.description: Use "Change Background" to describe scenes like "white studio background". Use "Recolor" to modify product colors like "change red to blue".

features.title: Powerful Features That Replace a Designer
features.description: From product images to design assets, from e-commerce to social media - handle any image effortlessly.

items.title: One-Click Auto Layering
items.description: AI automatically recognizes objects in images and separates products, backgrounds, and decorations into independent layers. Hair-strand precision, natural edges.

items.title: AI Smart Background Replacement
items.description: Describe backgrounds like "white background" or "studio scene" and AI automatically replaces them with intelligent, realistic filling.

items.title: One-Click Object Selection
items.description: Complex products, transparent materials, hair details - all precisely cut out. 100x faster than manual selection.

items.title: Independent Layer Editing
items.description: Each element becomes an independent layer. Adjust color, opacity, position separately - works like Photoshop but simpler.

items.title: High-Definition Export
items.description: Support 1K, 2K, 4K resolution export with AI-enhanced details. Meets high-quality requirements for e-commerce and print.

items.title: Batch Processing
items.description: Upload multiple images for automatic batch layer processing. 100 product images processed in minutes.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about usage, pricing, and capabilities

items.question: Is this tool really free? Are there hidden charges?
items.answer: Basic features are completely free! You get 10 credits upon registration (enough for 2 images), and can earn more daily through check-ins. Most users are fine with the free tier. If you need high-frequency usage, credit packs are available with transparent pricing - no hidden fees.

items.question: I don't know design - can I use this tool?
items.answer: Absolutely! This tool is designed for non-designers. If you can upload images and click a mouse, you can use it. Upload → Click Layer → Download, done in 3 steps. 100x simpler than Photoshop.

items.question: How accurate is the layering? Can it handle complex images?
items.answer: Our AI uses Qwen's latest vision model with high accuracy. Product photos, portraits, design assets - all handled well. For especially complex images, use the "Deep Decompose" feature for more detailed analysis.

items.question: How long does it take to process one image?
items.answer: Typically 3-5 seconds to complete layering. Actual time depends on image size and complexity, but rarely exceeds 10 seconds. Much faster than manual Photoshop work.

items.question: What formats are supported? Any size limits?
items.answer: Supports PNG, JPG, WEBP and other common formats. Recommended image size under 10MB for best results and speed.

items.question: What resolutions can I export?
items.answer: Support 1K, 2K, 4K resolution export. Free users can export at original resolution. Paid users can use AI-enhanced HD export for e-commerce, print, and other high-quality needs.

items.question: Can I use this for commercial purposes?
items.answer: Yes! Paid users get full commercial use rights - perfect for e-commerce product images, ad designs, marketing materials, and other business scenarios.

items.question: Are images uploaded to servers? Is it secure?
items.answer: Images are temporarily uploaded during processing and automatically deleted when complete. We use encrypted transmission and strictly follow privacy policies. Your images are never used for other purposes.
